title: CVE-2023-21507 — CVSS 4.4 (MEDIUM)
content:
# CVE-2023-21507

CVSS Score: 4.4 (MEDIUM)
Published: 2023-05-04T21:15:11.150
CWEs: CWE-125, CWE-125

Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability while processing BC_TUI_CMD_SEND_RESOURCE_DATA_ARRAY command in bc_tui trustlet from Samsung Blockchain Keystore prior to version 1.3.12.1 allows local attacker to read arbitrary memory.

References: https://security.samsungmobile.com/serviceWeb.smsb?year=2023&month=05, https://security.samsungmobile.com/serviceWeb.smsb?year=2023&month=05
